---
# ============================================================
#  anexos.qmd  –  Documentación Técnica (Anexos) TFG GIS UBU
#  Universidad de Burgos · Escuela Politécnica Superior
# ============================================================
title: " "
author: " "
 
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: memoir
    classoption: [a4paper, 12pt, twoside]
    pdf-engine: pdflatex 
    include-in-header: preambulo_anexos.tex
    maketitle: false
    keep-tex: false
    number-sections: true
    toc: false
    toc-depth: 3
    lof: false
    lot: false
    cite-method: natbib
    biblio-style: apalike
    bibliography: bibliografiaAnexos.bib
    lang: es

knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    echo: true
    warning: false
    message: false
    fig.pos: "!h"
    out.width: "90%"
    fig.align: "center"
---

```{=latex}
%% ── Portada anexos ──────────────────────────────────────────
\title{Título del Trabajo Fin de Grado}
\author{\nombre}
\date{\today}

\maketitle
```

```{=latex}
\frontmatter
\clearpage
\mainmatter
\pagestyle{chapterfirst}
\appendix

\renewcommand{\contentsname}{Índice general}
\renewcommand{\listfigurename}{Índice de figuras}
\renewcommand{\listtablename}{Índice de tablas}


\tableofcontents
\clearpage
\listoffigures
\clearpage
\listoftables
\clearpage
\pagestyle{mipc}
```

{{< include qmd/A_planificacion.qmd >}}
{{< include qmd/B_diseno.qmd >}}
{{< include qmd/C_requisitos.qmd >}}
{{< include qmd/D_manual_usuario.qmd >}}
{{< include qmd/E_manual_programador.qmd >}}
{{< include qmd/F_datos.qmd >}}
{{< include qmd/G_experimental.qmd >}}
{{< include qmd/H_ODS.qmd >}}
{{< include qmd/I_prompts.qmd >}}
